title: updater-pubspec plugin configuration
description: Schema v1 for the updater-pubspec semrel plugin. Configure via SEMREL_* environment variables.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_PUBSPEC_PATH.description: Path to the pubspec.yaml file to update.

SEMREL_PLUGIN_PUBSPEC_BUILD_STRATEGY.description: How to compute the pubspec build number suffix ("version+build"). "none" leaves the build number untouched, "increment" bumps the existing build number by one, "release-count" sets it from SEMREL_RELEASE_COUNT (or SEMREL_BUILD_NUMBER as a fallback).

SEMREL_PLUGIN_PUBSPEC_BUILD_NUMBER.description: Explicit build number to use, overriding SEMREL_PLUGIN_PUBSPEC_BUILD_STRATEGY entirely.

SEMREL_RELEASE_COUNT.description: Total number of releases so far, supplied by semrel core. Used as the build number when SEMREL_PLUGIN_PUBSPEC_BUILD_STRATEGY is "release-count".

SEMREL_BUILD_NUMBER.description: Fallback build number supplied by semrel core, used when SEMREL_RELEASE_COUNT is unavailable.

SEMREL_VERSION.description: Release version for the current semrel execution. semrel core may expose this as SEMREL_VERSION, SEMREL_TAG_NAME, or SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION depending on phase.

SEMREL_NEXT_VERSION.description: Calculated next release version when SEMREL_VERSION is not yet finalized.

SEMREL_DRY_RUN.description: When true, perform validation and logging only without executing side effects.
